# growthbook_project (Data Source)

Look up an existing GrowthBook project by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "growthbook_project" "web" {
  id = "prj_abc123"
}

output "web_project_name" {
  value = data.growthbook_project.web.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Unique project identifier (e.g. `prj_...`).

### Read-Only

- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC3339).
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp (RFC3339).
- `description` (String) Project description.
- `name` (String) Project name.
- `stats_engine` (String) Default statistics engine.
